message:
test(serve): batch 20 — WS client, policy validate, checkpoint, bead deps, utility tests

Exercises sendAck/sendError/sendPong with buffered channels + full-buffer
drop path, policy validate with invalid YAML/empty rules/no version,
checkpoint list with details=true and delete not-found, bead deps JSON
parse, handleListBeads with status filter, handleSessionAgents success
path, writeJSON, toJSONMap success + marshal error.

Key per-function improvements:
- toJSONMap: 100% (was 75%)
- sendAck: 83.3% (was 66.7%)
- sendError: 83.3%
- sendPong: 80.0%
- handleDeleteCheckpoint: 53.8% (exercises Exists check)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
